must_have_quals: Experience with backend engineering, Experience building infrastructure on Kubernetes, Experience with Elasticsearch, Experience with Terraform (IaC), Experience in setting up staging environments for safer releases, Experience with observability and tracing (metrics, logging, distributed tracing)
core_responsibilities: Build out the infrastructure required to rapidly scale up the engineering organization, Built self-hosted Elasticsearch infrastructure on Kubernetes, enabling real-time search across millions of alerts and associated metadata, Defined core infrastructure using Terraform (IaC), allowing reproducible, version-controlled environments and faster onboarding for new engineers, Stood up a dedicated staging environment, enabling safer releases, feature validation, and automated integration testing before production rollouts, Introduced observability and tracing (metrics, logging, distributed tracing), improving our ability to debug performance issues and maintain reliability at scale
job_summary: Doppel is a company focused on combating digital threats such as social engineering and deepfakes, aiming to make the internet a safer place. They are seeking an experienced backend engineer to build and scale the infrastructure necessary for their AI-native social engineering defense platform, which involves monitoring billions of digital entities and deploying adaptive AI agents.
